message:
feat(delete): integrate rich output into delete command

Add rich rendering for delete command operations:
- Warning panel for blocked dependents with issue titles
- Dry-run preview showing items to delete, cascade, and orphan
- Success panel with deletion summary and dependency counts
- Visual indicators: ✗ for deleted, ↳ for cascade, ⚠ for orphaned

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
